arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the transit gateway attachment.

association_state.description: The current state of the association between the transit gateway and the route table.

association_transit_gateway_route_table_.description: The ID of the route table associated with the transit gateway attachment.

id.description: The unique identifier for the transit gateway attachment.

resource_id.description: The ID of the resource (e.g., VPC or VPN connection) attached to the transit gateway.

resource_owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the resource attached to the transit gateway.

resource_type.description: The type of resource attached to the transit gateway (e.g., VPC, VPN).

state.description: The current state of the transit gateway attachment.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the transit gateway attachment.

transit_gateway_attachment_id.description: The ID of the transit gateway attachment.

transit_gateway_id.description: The ID of the transit gateway to which the resource is attached.

transit_gateway_owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the transit gateway.
